subject: Your Ambrook trial wraps up in a week - here's where you stand
previewText: A quick check on your setup progress before billing begins.
module_17679755340991:
Hi {{ contact.firstname }},

 

Your Ambrook free trial ends in 7 days, on {{ contact.trial_end_date }}. After that, your {{ contact.plan_name }} subscription begins at {{ contact.plan_price }}/month, and the card on file will be charged automatically.

 

Before that happens, I want to make sure you're set up to get real value from Ambrook on day one of your subscription.

 

Here's your setup progress:

 

[✓/✗] Set up your chart of accounts

[✓/✗] Connected your bank accounts

[✓/✗] Tagged your first transactions

[✓/✗] Set up your balance sheet

[✓/✗] Explored Ambrook Wallet

 

If any of these are unchecked, you still have time.

module_17689264485441.text: Pick up where you left off →

module_17701412628691:
And if you're stuck on anything — bank connections being finicky, categories feeling overwhelming, not sure where to start — just reply to this email. I'll personally make sure you get help before your trial ends.

 

Best,
module_17701491924253:
Paige Wyler

Head of Customer Success, Ambrook
